technical_improvement.baseline_problem: Conventional MapReduce does not efficiently process heterogeneous data sources with different schemas.
technical_improvement.mechanism: Map grouped key/value data from different schemas into identifiable intermediate data sharing a common key, then reduce with group-specific iterators and metadata.
technical_improvement.technical_effect: Distributed relational-style joins and related operations across heterogeneous schemas.

notes: The public excerpts include mechanism, data structures, distributed architecture, and pseudocode-style support.
